name: Blood Vendetta

spell.name: Blood Vendetta
spell.trigger: A creature deals piercing, slashing, or persistent bleed damage to you

heightened.text: The persistent bleed damage increases by 2d6.

spell.success: The target takes half the persistent bleed damage.
spell.failure: The target takes the full persistent bleed damage. Until the bleeding stops, the target has weakness 1 to piercing and slashing damage.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, but the target takes double the persistent bleed damage.

text: You curse the target, punishing it for having the audacity to spill your blood. The target takes 2d6 persistent bleed damage and must attempt a Will save.
